name: Pulse Panel
comment: The PULSE PANEL features the same LED layout found on the Pulse Panel FX. 1,152 1.5W RGB LEDs spread across 24 zones around its perimeter, arranged in a grid of 6 zones wide and 4 zones tall. In addition to this, it includes a central strobe line comprising 288 5W cool-white LEDs organized into 24 zones, with 12 zones across and 2 zones tall. These are separated by a line of 96 1.5W RGB LEDs divided into 12 zones. Furthermore, there are 144 additional 5W cool-white LEDs divided into 24 zones, with 12 zones at the top and 12 at the bottom of the fixture's face. These outer LEDs utilize a linear prismatic lens similar to those used in our Rayzor Blade fixtures. When combined, these components deliver an astonishing output exceeding 100,000 total lumens.
